title: Balloon Powered Launch Car,Inflatable balloon car toy pump set, Hand Push Air Power Balloon Racer Vehicle Car Toy for Kids/Toddlers Gift
features: 【BALLOONS CAR Toy】-This product can combine Balloons and toy cars and make them unique.At the same time,The Children have an extra pull back car toy .This is exactly what your children really want.The balloon car kit is made of ABS plastic ,surface of this toy set is as smooth as the pictures show and won't hurt your kids' skin.The environmentally-friendly materials are non-toxic and tasteless allow the baby to play with.

【EDUCATIONAL TOYS】 - This is an Air-Powered balloon car vehicle set for kids‘s science experiment about Aerodynamics knowledge. The product has a compact structure and is resistant to falling and abrasion.The whole product is rounded corners will not hurt your Kids‘s hands.Use aerodynamics to promote environmental protection and energy saving without having to use the battery.Develop your kids’ observational and hands-on skills.Involve Kids playing and stay away from electronics.

【CUTE CARTOON DESIGN】- Colorful,simple operation and a lot of creative ideas.Inspire your child to explore the wonders of science with this toy.Balloons and toy cars are always children's favorites.However, this product can combine the two and make them unique.You do not have to worry about the children with the mouth to blow up the balloon and endanger the children's health, At the same time,The Children have an extra pull back car toy .This is exactly what your children really want.
【SAFETY AND HIGH QUALITY】This balloon car set is made of BPA-free, non-toxic ABS plastic. The surface of this toy set is smooth as shown without harming your child's skin.

【Dual Modes】: With the different accessories (cars and launch tower), the toy has 2 play modes: car mode and launch tower mode. In car mode, it powers the car move forward on the ground; in launch mode, it sends the rocket or spaceman into the air.Different ways of playing, Different Fun!
description: Product Description Balloon Powered Cars Party Supplies Educational Science Toys Looking for a unique toy that delivers hours of play while stimulating your child's imagination and development? This balloon powered car is a new high-quality balloon racing car with scientific and physical design, kids will learn a lot about scientific and physical knowledge while playing racing, improving their hand-eye coordination, fine motor skills and observational ability. Package Content: -1 x Inflator ,2 x Mini Car ,12 x Balloon, 1 x Launch Pad ,1 x Rocket ,1 x Spaceman Tips for Play: To achieve a better flight effect, we suggest you adjust the joint between the balloon and air outlet of the launch pad to make sure the balloon vertically when it is inflated. Product Features •In this Balloon-Powered Car, we’ll show you how to use air pressure to power the toy car. A balloon-powered car is pushed forward by air escaping from a balloon, and it is fun and easy to play with your kids together. •This balloon racer car kit will keep kids happy and entertained for hours, and give them a break from playing silly games on a tablet or watching videos on TV. Exercise hand-eye coordination fine motor skill development learn aerodynamics knowledge develop child's observational skills improve children's intellectual development Improve parent-child friendship WAY TO PLAY: Car Mode: it pushes the car moves forward on the ground after the balloon gets inflated. 1. Open the roof of the car, connect the balloon to the air outlet of the inflator. 2. Fix the car in the air outlet of the inflator. 3. Get the balloon inflated by pressing the rod continuously. 4. Press the start button on the inflator, then the car will move forward. Launcher Towel Mode: it sends the rocket or spaceman into the air. 1. Connect the launch tower to the pump. 2. Fix the balloon in the air outlet of the rockets or spaceman 3. Get the balloon inflated by pressing the rod continuously. 4. Press the start button, then the rocket or spaceman will fly into the air. Attach the car to the pump Fix the car in the air outlet of the inflator.Easy to operate. Blow up the balloon with the pump Get the balloon inflated by pressing the rod continuously. Press the button to release the car Press the start button on the inflator, then the car will move forward with inertial power. Why You Should Choose Us? UNIQUE DESIGN: This toy is specially designed for the inflator toy with dual modes (cars and launchpad), just connect it, then get the balloon inflated, the car can move forward on the ground or the spaceman can fly into the air. DUAL MODES: With the different accessories (cars and launchpad), the toy has 2 play modes: car mode and launchpad mode. In car mode, it powers the car move forward on the ground; in launch mode, it sends the rocket or spaceman into the air. EDUCATION TOYS:This is a set of aerodynamic vehicles, suitable for children's scientific experiments in aerodynamic knowledge. It would increase children's interest in science and knowledge.
